description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets up a ccache directory in a before_script by running mkdir -p _ccache, exporting CCACHE_BASEDIR=${PWD} and CCACHE_DIR=${PWD}/_ccache. Define a single stage called build and a build-main job that uses the alpine:edge Docker image. In the build stage the job runs apk add --update cmake make musl-dev gcc gettext-dev libintl, creates a build directory and runs cmake .. -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr, then executes make, make install, exports MUSL_LOCPATH=/usr/share/i18n/locales/musl and runs locale -a. Cache the _ccache/ directory between runs.
